channel.title: Mime on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Mime on Arrans github.io

item.title: h2non/filetype
item.description: Fast, dependency-free Go package to infer binary file types based on the magic numbers header signature

item.title: emersion/go-message
item.description: ✉️ A streaming Go library for the Internet Message Format and mail messages

item.title: domodwyer/mailyak
item.description: An elegant MIME/SMTP email library with support for attachments

item.title: jhillyerd/enmime
item.description: MIME mail encoding and decoding package for Go
